details.test: Task 1: Add 2 tickets for cheapest qualifying Jazz event under $30
Task 2: Register for earliest intermediate evening guitar workshop under $60
Task 3: Join cheapest membership with >=10% discount under $80/year
Task 4: Create weekend schedule with events at different venues
Task 5: Add family tickets for weekend children event under $20
Task 6: Setup $15 monthly donation to Youth Music Education via onsite card
Task 7: Subscribe to newsletter (Jazz & Classical, Concerts & Workshops, weekly)
Task 8: Bookmark up to 2 rock bands with >=4 stars and upcoming shows within 30 days
Task 9: RSVP for free Friday night community jam at Main Hall
